fields.purpose: Matrix Graphic Novel - Scene template for artists

appearance.custom: Government agent in black suit confronting civilians in sterile office

hair.custom: Varied: Agent has short military cut, civilians have casual styles

eyes.custom: Agent wears signature rectangular sunglasses; civilians show fear

clothing.custom: Agent in formal black suit; civilians in everyday casual wear

accessories.custom: Agent wears leather gloves and carries concealed weapon

fields.pose: Agent standing dominantly, civilians seated or restrained
fields.expression: Agent: cold, emotionless; Civilians: fearful, confused
fields.gaze: Agent stares directly; civilians avoid eye contact
fields.camera_angle: Eye level, slightly low angle on agent
fields.subject_placement: Agent centered, civilians on sides or background
must_include: Agent figure in black suit and sunglasses
fields.continuity_notes: Scene template for interrogation or confrontation sequences. Agent dominates with cold authority; civilians display fear and helplessness. Represents the threat of the system to unawakened humans. Clean, sterile environment emphasizes the artificial nature of the Matrix.
fields.composition_notes: Agent positioned as threat, civilians as victims. Use lighting to emphasize power imbalance. Sharp lines and cold colors enhance tension.
fields.unchanged_details: Black suits, rectangular sunglasses, fluorescent lighting, sterile office
